app.name: Maple Ledger
app.tagline: A practical monthly budget, without the noise.

auth.subtitle: Track spending, set a monthly target, and keep your money picture clear.
auth.toggleToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.successSignup: Account created. Check your inbox if email confirmation is enabled.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: This month at a glance
dashboard.empty: No transactions yet for this month.
dashboard.emptyHint: Add a transaction to start seeing summaries and charts.
dashboard.budgetMissing: Set this month's budget to track progress.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Every entry in one place
transactions.loadError: We couldn't load your transactions right now.

ai.title: AI transaction capture
ai.subtitle: Upload a receipt or speak a transaction out loud. Maple Ledger will turn it into a structured candidate and hold it here until you approve it.
ai.captureSubtitle: Choose a photo or voice pass. Every successful parse lands in the review queue on the right.
ai.photoHint: Compress, upload, and parse one receipt or purchase photo at a time.
ai.voiceHint: Speak naturally, like “I spent 500 on clothes at Zara today.”
ai.photoDescription: Use this for receipts, invoices, or simple purchase photos. Images are compressed in the browser before they go to the parser.
ai.voiceDescription: Record a short statement about the transaction. Audio is uploaded, transcribed, parsed, and added to the same queue.
ai.pipelineDescription: Nothing gets inserted automatically. Each AI result becomes a candidate stripe first, so you can approve it or remove it before it becomes a real transaction.
ai.queueSubtitle: Approve items to write them into transactions, or remove anything that looks off.
ai.emptyDescription: Upload a photo or record a voice note to start building your review queue.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Keep the month grounded
budgets.empty: No budget set for this month yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Language, profile, and future hooks
settings.premiumTeaser: Premium insights and automation can live here later.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
